review_title: Smart & Easy Solution for my Organisation
description: It has been amazing so far. the support team is like a part of our own organisation. They go to lengths to help us implement the systems and are always eager to respond to our many requests
author: Parth R.
pros: The time tracking feature along with location capture is a breeze to use while it ensures that the records are accurate and upto date. We were using biometric machines but the data was not available to us in real time moreover there's not much data interpretation. ubiAttendance is very advanced and we love it
cons: Some of the features only work in online mode. We should be able to store reports in offline to review as and when required

description: Wonderful and it helps me to manage my business more efficiently
author: Tariq N.
pros: I like all module specially employee tracking and reporting.
cons: need to work on tracking to fix few bugs

description: Overall, it is a worthwhile experience that somewhat ease the management of an area of the business for a certain period. Unfortunately, which our changing business model, we now use a regular biometric equipment in our office because we have lessen client engagement that requires on-site reporting.
author: Alexander Q.
pros: The product features a mobile access for time recording through use of location and visits tracking which is most important for companies who have employees on a official business majority of the time.
cons: The system UI has too much data, processes too much data, or high traffic on server wherein it requires some time and strong internet connection to load properly. This becomes the main issue of our employees, especially those at areas with weak data connectivity. Also, some mobile units do not support the functionalities of the app which is a minor cons.

description: It was a great product. It helped us to track attendance on different Project Sites and also check their appearance as required at site.
author: Antriksh T.
pros: Easy to use Attendance Tracking Software with Selfie Based Marking and Geo-Fencing system
cons: Archive of Employees when they are gone. IT has problem with employees who are out of company

description: My experience was awesome, I was looking for attendance app on play store. Fortunately for me Ubi app turned out to be the best that meet up with my expectation and gave me more features. They also have a good relationship officer that always attends to any challenge while using the app. Indeed it was a lovely experience. Thank you.
author: Tomike O.
pros: The software is user friendly and has a video to watch how to use it.
cons: Please add a reminder for Time in and out! Automated notification that reminds employees to Time in and out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It was good however they can improve a lot in their features and most important customer service that they provide.Their service provider don't solve our issue quickly and don't pick out phone many times which is not appreciated.
author: Priyanka S.
pros: It's easy to use and quite affordable. Employees can understand it's features easily. As for employer they are able to track and mark employees attendance at sitting in their office which is really good.
cons: It's features, daily issue after each update and crashing of app many times. Not able to get exact location of employees and various permission that need to be granted because of which it drain our phone battery.

description: Overall experience depends on day to day usage. In day to day usage employees are facing problem on the mobile phones to punch the attendance. While processing salaries when management is asking them questions as to why they didn't punch the attendance on a particular day, they are of the view that, software is not working. Already this has been communicated to the concerned person.
author: Shyam B.
pros: Time tracking and remote tracking.
cons: Nothing as such. Software is good.

review_title: Software don't work smoothly as most of the time user have to logout and log in.
author: Ashok S.
pros: product is easy to use, idea and the concept is very good. Though the price is bit erpensive.
cons: There is no option for group attendance/amending in case of missed punch in normal paid software, even for this one need to pay. I may not renew this software in future.

description: Good , Few things we have to do manually where it will consume lot of time of mine , its should be designed as per our Company rules.
author: Shereen M.
pros: Able to track the attendance date wise .
cons: Yes , need to implement more features , if unknowingly anything is done from HR end , that should be able to correct it from background , Many other features also need to add .

description: It's useful software but ours is a very small company and we are interested in the attendance and salary calculation of the employees with this software. In that view it is good at the point of attendance and much critical at the point of salary calculation UI.
author: Bipin B.
pros: Time Tracking and Attendance tracking is accurate.
cons: Generation of reports is bit confusing .

author: Saurabh J.
pros: Easy of uses. Even not skilled staff easily marked their attendance.
cons: Reporting of attendance summary of yesterday. Actually we need summary for same day.

author: Brian A.
pros: Easy to integrate in our work processes and day to day tasks
cons: Sometimes there are system bugs that need to be fixed.

author: Sebastian T.
pros: Easy of use and reporting features are good
cons: Pricing is a little high compared to other products in the market

description: Very poor customer services, finding very difficult to reach the team
author: Arasan M.
pros: Geo Location capture and selfie photos.,
cons: New employee addition option we could not find.

author: Amit B.
pros: Pricing Reporting Dashboard Access to all sub
cons: Always have one problem or the other . The main frequency of the problem lies in the location attendance . Candidates not able to Punch many times due to Flaws in camera and location .

author: Alekh S.
pros: Leave management system impressed me the most. This helps to track all the employees through a centralised portal.
cons: Automated roster is something I was looking at. This intelligence needs to be added

description: It is the worst experience. I would like to apply for the refund. The company does not attend to calls when called multiple times. No call back nothing. It is the worst professional approach towards the customers.
author: Prashant P.
pros: Nothing. I dint like any thing about the software.
cons: Not professional. Complaint number is not getting answered.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Saloni O.
pros: It is nice and easy to use. Very helpful for my business and saves my time from hectic manul attendance. Thank you team!
cons: I did't find any error in ubiAttendance App

author: Elsa L.
pros: Easy to use for all employees specially in remote locations
cons: Limitation in reports maybe give option to customize

author: Ahmed A.
pros: Very useful app. Need some development. Location should be precise
cons: Location is not precise. Needs improvement in this area

description: Had been using ubiAttendance as Administrator from past 2 years & have been satisfied with the quality & quantity of features provided. Managing attendance & leaves were not so easy before ubiAttendance. Ideal for any size organization, very much recommended if workforce is spread across locations.
author: Ketan N.
pros: Adding an employee to this system is very much simple, easy & quick & so is using the App. Movement of employee from registration to inactivation & to exit is very easy to handle. We are getting tons of different reports in desired formats according to our need on single click.
cons: Any additional features will be highly welcomed : )

review_title: Attendance tracking and reports results are not upto mark
author: Liby B.
pros: easy to use, employees can use the app at any place.
cons: punching gets late, coz it loads a lot on attendance tracking. proper attendance report is not maintained. we have to overdo on the report
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Abhilash D.
pros: The ease of installing and briefing the usage to a new Employee
cons: Often the App crashes and doesn't automatically show time-in details while using for Attendance marking.

author: Elaine S.
pros: Their Customer Service is very responsive.
cons: After every editing/update the page goes back to page 1 and shows only the first 10 employees. I always get pop-up messages for activity logs of people outside our organization.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nouman Y.
pros: It is good in time tracking giving all the minor details which you require while managing your employees.
cons: There are some problems like some time it suddenly stop working without any problem.so just need to resolve this problem. Overall it is good app to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
